# Alan Reid — Fractional CTO & Technology Advisor

> Senior technical consulting and hands-on engineering. 20+ years building software products. Based in Berlin, available remotely.

## Services

- **Fractional CTO**: Technology strategy & roadmap advisory, architecture consulting, AI strategy & adoption, vendor & tool evaluation, engineering process consulting. For teams without a CTO.
- **Tech Advisory**: Helping founders and executives cut through complexity — where AI moves the needle, choosing the right technical path before it gets expensive to change course.
- **Tech Due Diligence**: Codebase, infrastructure, and team assessments for investors, acquirers, and boards who want the real state of things.
- **Software Engineering**: Architecting and building systems for scale and reliability — event-processing pipelines, production-ready infrastructure.

## About

Alan has co-founded companies in Berlin and Buenos Aires, led engineering teams, and built products for clients from fintech to fitness across the US and Europe. He brings dual perspective: hands-on technical depth combined with real business acumen. Fluent in English, German, and Spanish.

### Technologies

AI/LLMs, TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, DevOps, Serverless, CI/CD, Kubernetes, Terraform, GraphQL

### Industries

Fintech, Health & Fitness, Mobility, AI, E-commerce, SaaS

### Select Clients

Gymondo, 7Mind, Abowire, Nomo Bank, Avala AI, Sport Thieme, Circ Mobility, Kettlebell Kitchen, Aureum Technologies
